question.text: In no case shall the auction be held beyond what period from the pay-in day?

answer.text: One week from the pay-in day of the settlement
Two weeks from the pay-in day
Three days from the pay-in day
One month from the pay-in day

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The auction shall not be held beyond one week from the pay-in day of the settlement in which the contract was entered. **The Trap:** This is measured from the pay-in day, not from the trade day. **Cross-Exam Context:** The one-week limit ensures timely resolution of short deliveries. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** In no case shall the auction be held more than once unless approved by special resolution of the CC's governing board.
